product_name: Bladez RPM R/C 1:10 Mega Monster Truck

bullets: MONSTER POWER - This full function radio control comes with real rubber jumbo tyres that are perfect for even the toughest terrain!
HOURS OF FUN - With a run time of at least 30 mins and a rechargeable battery, this Mega Monster Trucks offers hours of fun!

ALL TERRAIN - This real performance machine comes in an eye catching design that makes it stand out from the crowd! It makes a great gift for inside or outside use and is perfect for kids 3 years and over!
TURBO MODE - This 1:10 scale Monster Truck has two speeds, so you can activate turbo mode and speed things up!
REAL PERFORMANCE MACHINES - Bladez RPM perfectly blends high performance with style making it perfect for kids and adults alike!
content.description: The Bladez RPM 1:10 RC Monster Truck has awesome mega rubber tyres, turbo mode and LED headlights. Featuring a bright neon deco and measuring at 42cm long, this all terrain 2.4 GHz radio control is the ultimate off road mean machine!

attributes.whats_in_box: 1 x Radio Control Monster Truck, 1 x Handset Controller, 1 x Rechargeable Li-ion Battery, 1 x USB Charging Cable, 1 x Instruction Manual

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
